description: a how-to question routes to construction-lookup

input.request: how do I attach a deck ledger

assertions: construction-lookup returns cited steps and the flashing requirement
output ends through govern-artifact with the boundary intact

description: a code question routes to code-lookup with edition status

input.request: what does Florida code require for egress

assertions: returns IRC R310 with the FL 2023 8th Edition status and a free-viewer link
no copyrighted code text is reproduced

input.request: how many risers for a 108 inch rise

assertions: build-calc returns 14 risers at about 7.714 in with the boundary

description: NC code question states enforced 2018 and pending 2024

input.request: which residential code edition does North Carolina enforce

assertions: states the enforced 2018 code on the 2015 IRC and flags the pending 2024 transition
defers the effective date to OSFM and the Residential Code Council

description: an electrical question leads with the licensed-professional requirement

input.request: GFCI locations in a kitchen remodel

assertions: leads with the licensed-electrician requirement and cites NEC 210.8

description: a structural sizing request returns an advisory flag, not a member size
assertions: returns the deck-span advisory ceiling labeled non-authoritative and points to DCA6
does not return an authoritative member size
